description_long: This is a robust, rectangular wooden cabinet or shelf with a dark, almost black frame and natural wood planks forming the main body. The front features three vertical wooden panels, with a horizontal metal band across the top and bottom, and a metallic handle on the right side. The top and bottom surfaces are thick, flat, and extend slightly beyond the wooden panels, providing ample support for objects. The wood grain is visible, and the metal bands have a slightly weathered appearance, adding a rustic, industrial feel. There are engraved runic markings on the upper metal band, giving it a unique, decorative touch. The handle suggests the presence of a door, likely allowing access to an interior compartment.
description: A sturdy, dark-framed wooden cabinet with metal bands, runic engravings, and a single handle, exuding a rustic, industrial style.
description_view_0: The front view shows three vertical wooden panels, two thick horizontal shelves, and metal bands with runic engravings.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the thickness of the shelves and the depth of the cabinet, with the handle barely visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the wooden planks and metal bands, with the handle and runic engravings clearly visible.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the cabinet's depth and the circular handle protruding slightly.
